title: Something Like Love
subTitle: Karan expresses his deep love through poetry, contrasting sharply with Simran's belief that true affection must mirror the perfect romance of the movie 'Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge'.

title: Saanjh
subTitle: SAANJH tells the story of Shyam and Sandhya, childhood friends who meet for the last time. Shyam loves Sandhya, but she sees him only as a friend. We surprisingly learn that Shyam is actually struggling with mental disorder, and Sandhya is nothing but just in his imagination. Despite the calm riverbank setting, Shyam's inner struggles are evident. As Shyam faces reality, he realizes he must accept things as they are, showing the power of love and understanding ourselves.

subTitle: An impoverished vocalist named Avik faces financial hardships as he tries to provide for his family while attempting to win over his love, Shukla.

His choice leads him down an unexpected path, filled with awkward moments and conflicting emotions. What begins as a straightforward transaction evolves into a profound learning experience, guided by an unexpectedly wise companion.

title: Sita Ram Chaddha
subTitle: Sita Ram Chaddha, a widower, longs for attention from his son and daughter-in-law who are busy with their own lives. Seeing his loneliness, Biba, his daughter, decides to help him out.

subTitle: Sahir moves to Mumbai with his family to pursue his dreams. However, he faces several challenges to establish himself as a poet and writer in the city of dreams.

subTitle: Upon receiving a call from a man in America about his ailing parents, a doctor visits their home. However, once there, she is shocked by what she sees.

title: On The Spot
subTitle: On a fateful day, Parul hails a taxi to visit her boyfriend Ansh. Ansh, eagerly anticipating her arrival, is thrown into restlessness. However, their journey takes an unexpected turn when the taxi driver receives news of his daughter falling ill. Witnessing this, Parul's compassionate response sparks anger in Ansh. Yet, in the face of adversity, Parul's decision unfolds, offering inspiration to the youth.

She discovers Aditya unconscious on the floor and immediately calls her friend Priya for help. Surprisingly, Priya dismisses Nisha's concerns, suggesting it's all imaginary. This unexpected response casts doubt on Aditya's existence and the reality of the entire situation, leaving Nisha confused about what's real and what might be a product of her imagination.
